title: Comparative Study of Interactional Metadiscourse Markers in the Discussion Section of Soft and Hard Science Research Articles: Hedges and Boosters in Focus
summary: 该文献围绕“Comparative Study of Interactional Metadiscourse Markers in the Discussion Section of Soft and Hard Science Research Articles: Hedges and Boosters in Focus”展开，当前可归入“建模与机理分析”相关研究。摘要显示其重点涉及The aim of this descriptive analytical study was to examine research articles discussion sections from four disciplines…。
analysis: 结合当前主题“理工科（STEM）学术写作中模糊语（Hedging / Vague Language）的使用及语用分析”，这篇文献的参考价值主要体现在：标题和摘要明确研究硬科学和软科学学术写作中模糊语(hedges)的使用及功能对比,符合主题和纳入标准。

title: Promotion and caution in research article abstracts: The use of positive, negative and hedge words across disciplines and rankings
summary: 该文献围绕“Promotion and caution in research article abstracts: The use of positive, negative and hedge words across disciplines and rankings”展开，当前可归入“相关机制研究”相关研究。摘要显示其重点涉及"Abstract as a promotional genre has been an increasing interest in recent years, leading to an intriguing debate on th…。
analysis: 结合当前主题“理工科（STEM）学术写作中模糊语（Hedging / Vague Language）的使用及语用分析”，这篇文献的参考价值主要体现在：标题和摘要明确研究学术写作摘要中模糊语(hedge words)的使用及跨学科对比,符合主题和纳入标准。
